aboutPage.role: QA Team Lead · Alatau City Bank · Almaty
aboutPage.summary: 7 years in QA across manual testing, API validation, automation, fintech domains, and team leadership. This knowledge base is built from hands-on practice to help QA engineers grow faster and move through the next career stage with more confidence.
aboutPage.offersSubtitle: Practical consulting focused on outcomes: interview prep, CV review, and career planning.

roadmapPage.title: The QA path from Junior to Lead
roadmapPage.subtitle: A static growth map with skills, tools, and rough timelines. Hover a card to spotlight a level and inspect its details.
